entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:RepaymentsOfBankDebt with a value of 4,618,488 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInFinancingActivitiesContinuingOperations is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:ProceedsFromRepaymentsOfDebt with a value of 0 in the extension taxonomy role 170000 - Statement - Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows, but us-gaap:RepaymentsOfBankDebt is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:ProceedsFromRepaymentsOfDebt in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. Please review the element selection to determine that an appropriate element has been used for these two line item concepts.
The properties of this us-gaap:RepaymentsOfBankDebt fact are:
Period :2022-01-01 to 2022-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9278 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - tanh_20fa.htm 2

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:ProceedsFromBankDebt with a value of 3,875,478 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInFinancingActivitiesContinuingOperations is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:ProceedsFromRepaymentsOfDebt with a value of 0 in the extension taxonomy role 170000 - Statement - Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows, but us-gaap:ProceedsFromBankDebt is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:ProceedsFromRepaymentsOfDebt in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. Please review the element selection to determine that an appropriate element has been used for these two line item concepts.
The properties of this us-gaap:ProceedsFromBankDebt fact are:
Period :2022-01-01 to 2022-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9278 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - tanh_20fa.htm 2

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:ProceedsFromConvertibleDebt with a value of 1,999,990 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInFinancingActivitiesContinuingOperations is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:ProceedsFromRepaymentsOfDebt with a value of 224,521 in the extension taxonomy role 170000 - Statement - Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows, but us-gaap:ProceedsFromConvertibleDebt is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:ProceedsFromRepaymentsOfDebt in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies.
